scripts.prebuild: npm run build:geom3d && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='public/calpinage';fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('calpinage/map-selector-bundle.js',p+'/map-selector-bundle.js');const ps=p+'/shading';fs.mkdirSync(ps,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('calpinage/shading/shadingEngine.js',ps+'/shadingEngine.js');fs.copyFileSync('calpinage/shading/nearShadingCore.cjs',ps+'/nearShadingCore.cjs');const p3=p+'/phase3';fs.mkdirSync(p3,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('calpinage/phase3/phase3Viewer.js',p3+'/phase3Viewer.js');fs.copyFileSync('calpinage/panelProjection.js',p+'/panelProjection.js');const pstate=p+'/state';fs.mkdirSync(pstate,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('calpinage/state/activePlacementBlock.js',pstate+'/activePlacementBlock.js');const peng=p+'/engine';fs.mkdirSync(peng,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('calpinage/engine/pvPlacementEngine.js',peng+'/pvPlacementEngine.js');console.log('[prebuild] map-selector-bundle.js, shadingEngine.js, nearShadingCore.cjs, phase3Viewer.js, panelProjection.js, activePlacementBlock.js, pvPlacementEngine.js copiés');"
scripts.qa:calpinage:v1: npm run check:calpinage:lock && npm run test:stability && npm run test:stress && npm run test:provider && npm run test:exportjson && npm run test:performance
